name: United American Petroleum Corp.
summary: United American Petroleum Corp., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the acquisition, exploration, development, and production of oil and gas properties in the United States. The company owns 100% working interests in the Marcee 1 Tract property that covers an area of approximately 112 acres located in Gonzalez County; and the Hector Lozano Tract, which covers an area of approximately 110 acres located in Texas. It also holds oil and gas interests in the Welder, Walker Smith, Merrick Gabriel and Rosser, McKenzie State Well, and McKinney interests, as well as in the Baily, Rogers, and Fahn interests located in Texas. Further, it provides operational services to third party well owners in Austin, Texas. United American Petroleum Corp. was founded in 2009 and is based in Austin, Texas.
